title: I.H.O.R.M.S
fullTitle: Integrated Hospital Operations & Resource Management System
domain: Enterprise Healthcare Platform | Full-Stack Web Application
description: Multi-tenant, role-based hospital operations platform unifying clinical workflows, resource tracking, billing, insurance, pharmacy, and audit compliance across multiple organizations and branches.
overview: IHORMS is a multi-tenant, role-based hospital operations platform built to unify clinical workflows, resource tracking, billing, insurance, pharmacy, and audit compliance across multiple organizations and branches. It solves the hospital silos problem by providing centralized organization-level oversight alongside branch-level operational autonomy, with strict data isolation between tenants. The system covers the full patient journey: registration → appointment → consultation → telemetry → prescription → billing → insurance → audit.

features.label: Multi-Tenant Architecture
features.description: Supports multiple hospital organizations, each with multiple branches. Strict tenant boundaries via org_id / branch_id scoping.

features.label: Role-Based Access Control (8 Roles)
features.description: super_admin, org_admin, branch_admin, doctor, nurse, receptionist, pharmacy_staff, patient. RBAC enforced at routing and API levels.

features.label: Appointment + Clinical Workflow
features.description: Full workflows for doctor, receptionist, and patient including scheduling, diagnosis, prescription.

features.label: Telemetry + ICU Monitoring
features.description: Nurse module with telemetry creation, ICU monitor, alert endpoints, room/equipment visibility.

features.label: Pharmacy Inventory
features.description: Inventory management, restock, stock adjustment, analytics, low-stock monitoring, order fulfillment.

features.label: Billing + Insurance
features.description: Billing creation, payment capture, insurance claim submission and status updates.

features.label: Audit and Compliance
features.description: Audit logs by entity type, patient access logs, system events (super admin only).

features.label: Production Frontend (IHORMS-X)
features.description: Role-based dynamic navigation, loading/error/empty state handling, strict no-demo-data policy.

algorithms.name: JWT Authentication
algorithms.description: Token-based auth persisted in localStorage with Axios interceptor for auto-attachment.

algorithms.name: RBAC Route Guarding
algorithms.description: Protected route entry validates role against allowlist, unauthorized redirects.

algorithms.name: Telemetry Alerting
algorithms.description: Backend threshold evaluation on nurse telemetry posts triggering alerts.

modules.name: Super Admin
modules.responsibility: Org CRUD + status control, platform analytics, system events

modules.name: Doctor Module
modules.responsibility: Appointments, schedule, patient search (UID), clinical actions

modules.name: Pharmacy Module
modules.responsibility: Inventory, restock, analytics, low-stock, order fulfillment

modules.name: Audit Module
modules.responsibility: Audit logs, patient access logs, system events

results: All 14 workflow modules implemented and integrated
Production-grade frontend with strict data contract discipline
